vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

fragment_roles: rows where OCCURRENCES <= 6
rows where 6 < OCCURRENCES <= 25
rows where 25 < OCCURRENCES <= 70
rows where OCCURRENCES > 70 or is NULL
rows where BILLABLEPERIOD <= 2010-03-31
rows where 2010-03-31 < BILLABLEPERIOD <= 2012-10-14
rows where 2012-10-14 < BILLABLEPERIOD <= 2015-05-06
rows where BILLABLEPERIOD > 2015-05-06 or is NULL

rows where START = 10/11/09 + rows where START = 1/10/82 + rows where START = 1/8/88 + rows where START = 6/4/04 + rows where START = 7/10/06 + rows where START = 2/9/12 + rows where START = 5/8/04 + rows where START = 10/6/06 + rows where START = 6/21/03
allergies||vfrag=start.fragment_role_A: rows where START = 10/11/09 + rows where START = 1/10/82 + rows where START = 1/8/88 + rows where START = 6/4/04 + rows where START = 7/10/06 + rows where START = 2/9/12 + rows where START = 5/8/04 + rows where START = 10/6/06 + rows where START = 6/21/03

base_predicate_sqls: (("CODE" IS NOT NULL AND "CODE" > 185349003 AND "CODE" <= 308335008) OR ("CODE" > 308335008 OR "CODE" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where CODE <= 185345009
rows where 185349003 < CODE <= 308335008 + rows where CODE > 308335008 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: ("DESCRIPTION" = 'Td (adult) preservative free' OR ("DESCRIPTION" = 'Hep B  adolescent or pediatric' OR "DESCRIPTION" = 'HPV  quadrivalent'))
(("DESCRIPTION" = 'DTaP' OR ("DESCRIPTION" = 'Hib (PRP-OMP)' OR "DESCRIPTION" = 'rotavirus  monovalent')) OR ("DESCRIPTION" = 'Pneumococcal conjugate PCV 13' OR "DESCRIPTION" = 'IPV'))

("DESCRIPTION" IS NULL OR "DESCRIPTION" NOT IN ('Influenza  seasonal  injectable  preservative free', 'Td (adult) preservative free', 'DTaP', 'Pneumococcal conjugate PCV 13', 'IPV', 'Hep B  adolescent or pediatric', 'HPV  quadrivalent', 'Hib (PRP-OMP)', 'rotavirus  monovalent'))
fragment_roles: rows where DESCRIPTION = Influenza  seasonal  injectable  preservative free
rows where DESCRIPTION = Td (adult) preservative free + rows where DESCRIPTION = Hep B  adolescent or pediatric + rows where DESCRIPTION = HPV  quadrivalent

rows where DESCRIPTION = DTaP + rows where DESCRIPTION = Hib (PRP-OMP) + rows where DESCRIPTION = rotavirus  monovalent + rows where DESCRIPTION = Pneumococcal conjugate PCV 13 + rows where DESCRIPTION = IPV

rows where DESCRIPTION is NULL or not in {'Influenza  seasonal  injectable  preservative free', 'Td (adult) preservative free', 'DTaP', 'Pneumococcal conjugate PCV 13', 'IPV', 'Hep B  adolescent or pediatric', 'HPV  quadrivalent', 'Hib (PRP-OMP)', 'rotavirus  monovalent'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
immunizations.fragment_role_A: rows where DESCRIPTION = Influenza  seasonal  injectable  preservative free
immunizations.fragment_role_B: rows where DESCRIPTION = Td (adult) preservative free + rows where DESCRIPTION = Hep B  adolescent or pediatric + rows where DESCRIPTION = HPV  quadrivalent

base_predicate_sqls: (("DESCRIPTION" = ' Amoxicillin 250 MG / Clavulanate 125 MG [Augmentin]' OR "DESCRIPTION" = 'Acetaminophen 325 MG Oral Tablet') OR (("DESCRIPTION" = 'Cisplatin 50 MG Injection' OR "DESCRIPTION" = 'Jolivette 28 Day Pack') OR ("DESCRIPTION" = 'Naproxen sodium 220 MG Oral Tablet' OR "DESCRIPTION" = 'Ibuprofen 200 MG Oral Tablet')))

("DESCRIPTION" IS NULL OR "DESCRIPTION" NOT IN ('Penicillin V Potassium 250 MG', 'Acetaminophen 160 MG', 'Penicillin V Potassium 500 MG', ' Amoxicillin 250 MG / Clavulanate 125 MG [Augmentin]', 'Acetaminophen 325 MG Oral Tablet', 'Cisplatin 50 MG Injection', 'Jolivette 28 Day Pack', 'Naproxen sodium 220 MG Oral Tablet', 'Ibuprofen 200 MG Oral Tablet'))
fragment_roles: rows where DESCRIPTION = Penicillin V Potassium 250 MG
rows where DESCRIPTION = Acetaminophen 160 MG + rows where DESCRIPTION = Penicillin V Potassium 500 MG

rows where DESCRIPTION =  Amoxicillin 250 MG / Clavulanate 125 MG [Augmentin] + rows where DESCRIPTION = Acetaminophen 325 MG Oral Tablet + rows where DESCRIPTION = Cisplatin 50 MG Injection + rows where DESCRIPTION = Jolivette 28 Day Pack + rows where DESCRIPTION = Naproxen sodium 220 MG Oral Tablet + rows where DESCRIPTION = Ibuprofen 200 MG Oral Tablet

rows where DESCRIPTION is NULL or not in {'Penicillin V Potassium 250 MG', 'Acetaminophen 160 MG', 'Penicillin V Potassium 500 MG', ' Amoxicillin 250 MG / Clavulanate 125 MG [Augmentin]', 'Acetaminophen 325 MG Oral Tablet', 'Cisplatin 50 MG Injection', 'Jolivette 28 Day Pack', 'Naproxen sodium 220 MG Oral Tablet', 'Ibuprofen 200 MG Oral Tablet'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
medications||vfrag=description.fragment_role_A: rows where DESCRIPTION = Penicillin V Potassium 250 MG
medications||vfrag=description.fragment_role_B: rows where DESCRIPTION = Acetaminophen 160 MG + rows where DESCRIPTION = Penicillin V Potassium 500 MG

base_predicate_sqls: ("passport" = 'FALSE' OR ((("passport" = 'X10207685X' OR "passport" = 'X10473431X') OR ("passport" = 'X10571629X' OR "passport" = 'X10792585X')) OR (("passport" = 'X11009081X' OR "passport" = 'X11720118X') OR ("passport" = 'X12022062X' OR "passport" = 'X12256217X'))))
fragment_roles: rows where passport = FALSE + rows where passport = X10207685X + rows where passport = X10473431X + rows where passport = X10571629X + rows where passport = X10792585X + rows where passport = X11009081X + rows where passport = X11720118X + rows where passport = X12022062X + rows where passport = X12256217X
rows where passport is NULL or not in {'FALSE', 'X10207685X', 'X10473431X', 'X10571629X', 'X10792585X', 'X11009081X', 'X11720118X', 'X12022062X', 'X12256217X'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
patients||vfrag=drivers.fragment_role_A: rows where passport = FALSE + rows where passport = X10207685X + rows where passport = X10473431X + rows where passport = X10571629X + rows where passport = X10792585X + rows where passport = X11009081X + rows where passport = X11720118X + rows where passport = X12022062X + rows where passport = X12256217X
patients||vfrag=drivers.fragment_role_B: rows where passport is NULL or not in {'FALSE', 'X10207685X', 'X10473431X', 'X10571629X', 'X10792585X', 'X11009081X', 'X11720118X', 'X12022062X', 'X12256217X'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
